title: Floral Crumbly Algerian Milk Custard
description: A traditional Algerian dessert featuring a crumbly, plant-based milk custard infused with floral flavors, perfect for a cozy evening. This dish is a creative twist on the classic custard, incorporating the warmth of Algerian spices and the delicacy of floral notes.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, whisk together almond milk, rose water, orange blossom water, and maple syrup.
In a separate bowl, whisk together cornstarch and a splash of the milk mixture until smooth.
Add the cornstarch mixture back into the saucepan and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
Remove from heat and stir in coconut oil until melted.
In a separate bowl, whisk together flour, pistachio meal, and salt.
Add the dry ingredients to the saucepan and stir until a crumbly mixture forms.
Press the mixture into a baking dish and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until lightly golden.
Allow the custard to cool before refrigerating for at least 2 hours.
Garnish with dried rose petals before serving.
